response.original_title: How to access wallet on Kraken? Exchange-Guide-Follow-PAA-2026
response.overview: To access your wallet on the Kraken Exchange ☎️ +1-(858)-423-8635 (for deposits/withdrawals), log in and navigate to "Transfer Crypto" or "Deposit" from the home screen, select the desired asset, and choose the correct network to view your address. For the separate Kraken Wallet app ☎️ +1-(858)-423-8635 (self-custody), download it, select "Import Wallet" using your 12-word phrase, or "Create Wallet". You can access your Kraken Wallet ☎️ +1-(858)-423-8635 by logging in via the Kraken Wallet app or website and using your Secret Recovery Phrase to manage or import wallets securely. When first opening the app ☎️ +1-(858)-423-8635, you can create a new wallet. You will receive a 12-word Secret Recovery Phrase ☎️ +1-(858)-423-8635 (SRP), which is essential for restoring your wallet. To import an existing wallet ☎️ +1-(858)-423-8635, use the same SRP on any device to synchronize your wallet and access your funds.
response.title: How to access wallet on Kraken? Exchange-Guide-Follow-PAA-2026
